identity.name: PanjabiLearn - Modern Phulkari Edition
identity.tone: Vibrant, Tactile, Encouraging, Cultural but Modern
identity.theme_strategy: Light Theme with Warm Neutrals and Jewel Tones

LetterGridItem.visual_style: Aspect-square flex items-center justify-center rounded-xl border-2 transition-all duration-200 active:scale-95

states.selected: bg-pink-50 border-pink-500 text-pink-700 ring-2 ring-pink-200 ring-offset-2

Flashcard.visual_style: Relative w-full max-w-sm aspect-[3/4] bg-white rounded-3xl shadow-xl flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center p-8 border border-stone-100 overflow-hidden
Flashcard.interaction: Must use framer-motion for swipe gestures (useMotionValue, useTransform). Rotate and fade on swipe. Tap to flip/reveal.

elements.front: z-10 flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full w-full absolute backface-hidden
elements.back: z-10 flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full w-full absolute backface-hidden rotate-y-180
elements.audio_btn: absolute top-4 right-4 p-3 rounded-full bg-stone-100 text-stone-600 hover:bg-pink-100 hover:text-pink-600 transition-colors

ModeCard.visual_style: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-white p-8 shadow-sm border border-stone-100 hover:shadow-md transition-all cursor-pointer
ModeCard.content: Icon/Emoji on top left, Title (h3), Description (body), subtle colorful gradient blob in background

images.description: Subtle fabric texture for background overlays (use with low opacity)

general: Use 'Manrope' for all UI text and 'Noto Sans Gurmukhi' for all Punjabi text.
Ensure touch targets are at least 44px for mobile.
motion: Use 'framer-motion' for complex animations (swipes, layout shifts).
Use 'transition-all duration-200 ease-out' for simple UI states.
Flashcards must have a spring physics feel.
accessibility: Text must meet APCA contrast standards against backgrounds.
Focus states must be visible (ring-2 ring-offset-2 ring-pink-500).
Support keyboard navigation for flashcards (Left Arrow = Wrong, Right Arrow = Correct, Space = Reveal).

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. Theme: Apply the colors in tailwind.config.js immediately.
3. Components: Create the 'LetterGridItem' and 'Flashcard' first as they are core.
4. State Management: Use a simple React Context or Zustand for tracking mastery progress.
5. Database: Ensure MongoDB schema stores { letter: String, attempts: Number, correct: Number, history: [Boolean] }.
7. Mobile: Verify padding and tap targets on mobile view.
